rationale: In the citing paper, Ho and Chong (2003) appears in an introductory grouped citation listing studies that use attribute-level or SKU-level choice modeling. The paper does not assign this specific citation a distinct role in theory development, model specification, hypothesis logic, or empirical benchmarking. Instead, the substantive technical lineage is explicitly built around Fader and Hardie (1996) and Andrews and Manrai (1999). Therefore, this citation functions as background context rather than a meaningful directional building block.
